tags.name: `mc-toolbar`
tags.description:
Purpose: A customizable toolbar component that groups elements in a logical way and and can be shown anywhere on the page.
Category: Layout, Navigation, Forms
When to use it: When you need a container for grouping related actions and content in a toolbar layout.
When not to use it: When you need a simple button or a non-toolbar related layout.
Works with components: mc-avatar, mc-button, mc-checkbox, mc-date-range, mc-file-upload, mc-input-date, mc-input-time, mc-input, mc-link-button, mc-menu, mc-multi-select, mc-number-stepper, mc-pagination, mc-radio, mc-select-native, mc-select, mc-select, mc-switch, mc-tag, mc-typeahead-multi-select, mc-typeahead
Alternative component names: Toolbar, Action Bar, Navigation Bar

Slots:

  * ``start`` {} - elements will be placed at the start of the toolbar.

  * ``center`` {} - elements will be placed at the center of the toolbar.

  * ``end`` {} - elements will be placed at the end of the toolbar.

Attributes:

  * `wrapbreakpoint` {Viewport} - wrapbreakpoint when the start, center or end slots will be wrapped and stacked.
Can be: `x-small` or `small`

Properties:

  * `toolbar` {`HTMLElement`} - 

  * `toolbarItems` {`HTMLElement[]`} - 

  * `slotOrder` {`string[]`} - 

  * `keyDownCounter` {`number`} - 

  * `directFocusableTags` {`Set<string>`} - 

  * `shadowHostTags` {`Set<string>`} - 

  * `componentsWithHiddenPopover` {`Set<string>`} - 

  * `allowedKeyboardInInnerComponentSelectors` {`Set<string>`} - 

  * `_allowedKeyboardCombinedSelector` {`string | null`} - 

  * `allowedKeyboardCombinedSelector` {`string`} - 

  * `directFocusableSelector` {`string`} - 

  * `wrapbreakpoint` {Viewport} - wrapbreakpoint when the start, center or end slots will be wrapped and stacked.
Can be: `x-small` or `small`

attributes.name: wrapbreakpoint
attributes.description:
`wrapbreakpoint` {Viewport} - wrapbreakpoint when the start, center or end slots will be wrapped and stacked.
Can be: `x-small` or `small`

Property: wrapbreakpoint

Default: x-small
